serverInfo.name: com.sap.s4/ewm-handling-unit
serverInfo.title: EWM Handling Unit MCP Server
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the SAP EWM Handling Unit OData API. Provides tools to read handling unit headers, packed items, and delivery reference documents for outbound pallet verification.

tools.name: get_handling_unit
tools.title: Get Handling Unit
tools.description: Retrieve a single handling unit by its external SSCC/barcode ID and warehouse. Returns HU header details including packaging material, weight, volume, and status.

parameters.name: HandlingUnitExternalID
parameters.description: Handling unit external SSCC barcode ID (e.g. '00340123450000012341')

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

tools.name: list_handling_units
tools.title: List Handling Units
tools.description: Retrieve a list of handling units with optional filtering. Supports OData query options.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (e.g. '10')

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

tools.name: list_handling_unit_reference_docs
tools.title: List Handling Unit Reference Documents
tools.description: Retrieve reference documents (delivery assignments) for a specific handling unit. Use this to resolve which outbound delivery order a given HU belongs to by following the _HandlingUnitReferenceDoc navigation.

parameters.name: HandlingUnitExternalID
parameters.description: Handling unit external SSCC barcode ID (e.g. '00340123450000012341')

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Fields to return: HandlingUnitExternalID, Warehouse, WarehouseDeliveryOrder, WarehouseDeliveryOrderItem, ReferenceDocumentCategory

tools.name: list_handling_unit_items
tools.title: List Handling Unit Items
tools.description: Retrieve all packed items within a specific handling unit. Returns product, quantity, and stock information for each item packed in the HU.

parameters.name: HandlingUnitExternalID
parameters.description: Handling unit external SSCC barcode ID (e.g. '00340123450000012341')

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Fields to return: HandlingUnitExternalID, Warehouse, Product, ActualQuantityInBaseUnit, BaseUnit
